AI-POWERED GOVERNANCE.

SMARTER SERVICES. BETTER MEGHALAYA.

Voice-enabled assistance, intelligent automation and real-time insights for citizens and officers — all in one unified platform.

AI
Transforming Meghalaya One into an Intelligent, Inclusive and Future-Ready Service Delivery Ecosystem.
Our Vision

Every Citizen, Every Service — Just a Conversation Away.

One intelligent platform for every scheme, service and department — with voice-first assistance in Khasi, Garo and English, smart document validation and AI-guided filing, built to reach every corner of Meghalaya.

ONE PLATFORM. ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES.

  • 200+ Services across 40+ Departments
  • Integrated with Meghalaya One & CM-Connect
  • AI-Powered Voice, Data & Knowledge Platform
  • Continuous Learning for Better Service Delivery
ABOUT THE PORTAL

Reimagining Government Services with Artificial Intelligence.

The Meghalaya Unified AI Service Delivery Portal is a flagship initiative by the Government of Meghalaya to bring every public service onto a single, intelligent and inclusive platform — one that listens, understands and responds to every citizen, in their own language.

Our Vision

A Meghalaya where every citizen — from Shillong to the remotest village — can access government services effortlessly, in any language, on any device, at any time.

Our Mission

Unify 200+ services across 40+ departments into a single AI-powered gateway that automates workflows, eliminates paperwork and accelerates approvals — making governance faster, fairer and more transparent.

Who We Serve

Citizens, officers, traders, departments and the CM Connect Centre — a single portal where every stakeholder collaborates, communicates and delivers public value with measurable outcomes.

Built on Six Strong Pillars.

Every interaction on the portal is powered by carefully engineered foundations that make AI safe, inclusive and effective for governance at scale.

01
Multilingual AI

Voice and chat in English, Khasi and Garo for every citizen.

02
Workflow Automation

Smart routing and tracking across departments end-to-end.

03
Data-Driven Decisions

Real-time dashboards and predictive insights for officers.

04
Security & Privacy

Role-based access, encryption and full audit trails by design.

05
Continuous Learning

The portal keeps improving with every citizen interaction.

06
Inclusive by Design

Accessibility, low-bandwidth support and offline-friendly flows.

Welcome to a Smarter Meghalaya.

Sign in to access AI-powered government services — apply for schemes, track applications, and connect with departments through one unified platform built for citizens, officers and traders.

Voice-First, Multilingual

Talk to the portal in English, Khasi or Garo and get instant AI-powered assistance.

Intelligent Assistance

AI helps you find the right scheme, auto-fills your forms and guides every step.

Faster Approvals, Fewer Rejections

Smart routing and document validation reduce processing time by up to 60%.

Secure & Trusted by Design

Government-grade encryption, role-based access and full data privacy.
